pages.text: $(o)"Even seasoned masons hate hauling rocks twice."$()$(br2)A side-product of the Old Engineering School: a projection tool that drops the standard tier layout straight onto the world.

pages.title: Controls
pages.text: $(l)Shift + Right-click air$() — cycle target tier (T1→T2→T3→T4→T5→T1)$(br2)$(l)Right-click core$() — build all missing blocks for the target tier$(br2)$(l)Shift + Right-click core$() — $(l)dry-run$(): list required materials, place nothing

pages.title: Costs
pages.text: $(l)Creative$(): free — all missing blocks placed.$(br2)$(l)Survival$(): consumed from inventory; missing blocks reported in chat.$(br2)Existing valid blocks are left intact — you can incrementally complete a half-built circle.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Always dry-run first to budget materials.$(br2)Indispensable for $(l)Tier 4 Dominion$() (169 blocks) and $(l)Tier 5 Primordial$() (289 blocks) — placement error rates climb fast at that scale.$(br2)Pair with the Attunement Chisel: wand for speed, chisel for verification.
